arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham rules out Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Bellingham on Liverpool deal and Premier League move Jude Bellingham has once again reiterated that he intends to stay at Real Madrid for the next 10 to 15 years.

arts.ttl: Liverpool flop reveals he is 'considering retirement' at 31 after failing to find a new club for the season
arts.sum: A former Liverpool star is considering hanging up his boots aged 31 after failing to find a new club. 'I don't think it would hit me that hard because I've already been going through this process,' he said.

arts.ttl: What Liverpool need to qualify for Champions League knockout stages as Real Madrid reality clear
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot's team prepares to face Real Madrid in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Real Madrid: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Aston Villa v Juventus | Email Michael Two changes for Slot since Liverpool’s win over Southampton. Diaz comes in for Gakpo and Mac Allister replaces Szoboszlai. Trent Alexander-Arnold is back on the bench after recovering from his injury troubles. Conor Bradley is tasked with marking Kylian Mbappé. What a huge game for Raúl Asencio at centre back for Real Madrid. The 21-year-old makes just his third senior appearance and his first game in the Champions League. There are two changes from the side that beat Leganés: Diaz comes in for the injured Vini Jr, and the evergreen Modric replaces Ceballos. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: I don't agree with Jamie Carragher - there's a bigger Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract issue
arts.sum: Speaking to the ECHO, Ally McCoist said he ultimately disagrees with Jamie Carragher's criticism of Mohamed Salah regarding his recent contract comments.
